raw_response: The Anker Nano 67W charger is an excellent choice for your travel needs due to its compact and foldable design, making it easy to carry in a pocket or bag. Despite being price-sensitive, you can appreciate the high-quality GaN technology that supports fast charging across two USB-C ports and one slower USB-A port. While it may get warm under full load and doesn't include a cable, its $35.99 price point is within your budget and aligns well with your quality sensitivity.
